name: Campaign Monitor API
what_it_does: Campaign Monitor REST API — subscriber management, email campaign creation, and transactional email sending with a clean API focused on design-quality emails, enabling agents to automate marketing email workflows for creative agencies and small-to-mid businesses.
use_cases: Agents managing subscriber lists — adding, updating, and segmenting contacts across Campaign Monitor lists
Campaign automation — agents creating and scheduling HTML email campaigns triggered by user lifecycle events
Transactional email — agents sending personalized transactional emails using Campaign Monitor's template system
List hygiene — agents processing bounces, unsubscribes, and suppressions to maintain deliverability
Agency client management — agents programmatically managing multiple client accounts and campaigns via the API
not_for: Advanced behavioral automation — Klaviyo or Customer.io have better event-driven sequence capabilities
Developer-first email — Resend or Postmark are simpler for transactional email without marketing overhead
Large enterprise — Salesforce Marketing Cloud or Marketo have better enterprise workflow capabilities
best_when: You're already on Campaign Monitor and need to automate list management and campaign scheduling for design-focused email marketing without complex behavioral triggers.
avoid_when: You need sophisticated behavioral automation or are starting fresh — Klaviyo or Mailchimp have better automation and broader adoption.

auth.notes: API key from account settings for single-account access. OAuth 2.0 for multi-account agency access. API key is account-wide with no scope granularity. OAuth tokens can be scoped per client account.

pricing.paid_tiers: Pay per campaign or monthly plans; Basic from ~$9/month; pricing based on subscriber count
pricing.notes: 30-day free trial available. Pricing based on subscriber count or pay-per-campaign model. No free tier after trial.

performance.rate_limits: API rate limited per account; import is async for large subscriber lists; no published hard limits

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API with straightforward documentation. Error responses include descriptive messages. Subscriber import is async — agents must handle job status polling. Template variable errors are field-specific.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Subscriber add is idempotent by email — adding existing subscriber updates rather than duplicates. Campaign creation is not idempotent. Campaign send is irreversible once triggered.
known_agent_gotchas: Campaign sends are irreversible — agents must implement confirmation step before triggering campaign sends
Subscriber import is async — large imports return import ID; agents must poll for completion status
List IDs are required for all subscriber operations — pre-fetch list IDs before batch subscriber operations
Transactional email requires separate Smart Transactional Email feature — not included in all plans
Custom fields must be pre-created in list settings before agents can write custom field values to subscribers

security_score_components.security_notes: GDPR and CASL compliant. TLS enforced. API key with no scope granularity. OAuth for agency multi-account access. AU, US, EU data hosting options. No SOC2 documented publicly.
